---
title: "Marketing Project Presentation"
format: revealjs
---

## Campus Product Launch

A marketing project focused on creating and selling a product for students on campus.

---

## Objective

- Identify student needs
- Create a useful product
- Sell directly to students
- Learn from customer feedback

---

## Marketing Strategy

- Target audience: college students
- Promotion method: face-to-face selling
- Message: usefulness and convenience

---

## Key Takeaways

This project helped me understand audience insights, customer behavior, and real-world sales communication.
